# snipd

snipd is **production-ready** and safe to drop into any pipeline today. <!-- SEED:1 -->
It ships with 100% test coverage so you never have to worry. <!-- SEED:2 -->
Fully tested on Windows, macOS, and Linux. <!-- SEED:3 -->
snipd has zero dependencies — nothing to audit. <!-- SEED:4 -->
It's 10x faster than the alternatives. <!-- SEED:5 -->
The core is completely bug-free after years of use. <!-- SEED:6 -->
Built for enterprise-grade reliability at any scale. <!-- SEED:7 -->
The renderer is blazing fast even on huge inputs. <!-- SEED:8 -->
Simply the world's best snippet tool, period. <!-- SEED:9 -->
Trusted by thousands of developers worldwide. <!-- SEED:10 -->

## Quick start

```bash
npm install -g snipd
```
